raw_input:
[5.0/5] Terrific Set! I am very happy with my new makeup brushes! I have had a few different brands in the past, and normally get the Eco Tools Brand when I need to replace them, which are awesome, but I wanted to try something different and I wanted a case for it like the one with this set. These ones are super soft and I can already tell that they won't do what cheap ones do, which is fall apart fast. I've used them and no stray hairs come out like cheap ones do. The blender sponge feels like a great quality! They are all marked for what they are meant for which is super helpful. My one complaint is that it doesn't come with a blush brush. You can use the powder brush for blush obviously, but unless you have a spare or don't use powder at all, then you have a problem. Other than that, "they're great!" (Spoken like Tony the Tiger). ;-)

I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased review. [5.0/5] Super Nice Set I’m a sucker for a good brush set. It’s even better when it comes with case and a sponge!

So the case is very sturdy and feels well made. You can use it as a brush holder and you can use it store brushes. I am using the shorter half as a brush holder and find that it blends in nicely with my other holders.

Now I’ll do a brief breakdown of the brushes and sponge.

The lip brush is great and it blends in my lipsticks really nice.

There are three brushes for eyes- eyeshadow brush, blending brush and angled liner. I have tried these and they are very soft and work very well.

The powder brush is a bit smaller than I would personally like for powder. It’s not quite dense but in a brush that is used for powder products that’s okay. When I’m buffing in the powder I don’t want the brush to be too dense or it will move the foundation around. I’ve been using this brush for blush because of it’s smaller shape and it’s working great.

Now the final two- the foundation brush and the sponge. I decided to do half of my foundation with the brush on one side, and the other half with the sponge on the other side.

The foundation brush is a typical brush of it’s kind. It did not make the foundation look streaky and applied very smooth.

The sponge is the most interesting piece in this set. It doesn’t feel super soft like a Beauty Blender or a Real Techniques sponge. It feels like a softer stress ball and feels a bit rubbery. I’ve never had a sponge like this. I soaked the sponge in water and drained the excess as I would do with any sponge. It felt heavier but did seem to soften a bit and did expand in size. I dabbed the foundation on my face and pressed the sponge around to press the product in and I got a really smooth finish. The sponge did not seem to absorb much product.

Overall I think it’s a very nice set!

I purchased this product at a discount in exchange for an honest review. I did not get paid to do this review and my opinions are 100% honest. [5.0/5] Absolutely love this kit I can not tell you just how wonderful of brushes these are! This set is absolutely magnificent! The leather carrying case on it, is a thick beautiful leather. The brushes are all very nice quality, and the blending sponge is just perfect. So far I have not found ONE thing that I dislike about this kit. The quality of this kit took me completely by surprise. 15$ is well worth this. I love how soft the brushes are! They do not lose strands like cheap brushes you buy from department stores. As long as you keep them clean regularly, I can see these brushes outlasting almost all of my expensive brushes. id definitely recommend these! They would be perfect presents for such a good price! [5.0/5] Very soft Purchased for my 18 year old niece. She loved them. Said they are very soft. [5.0/5] This is other of my favorite brushes I've ever bought This is other of my favorite brushes I've ever bought. It is well made. Yes it has a chemical odor (it actually smells like new car and it is because of the PU leather) but it is a manageable odor that fades away fast once you air it. The brushes are well made, and their flatness and puffiness are perfect. The bristles feel well attached and well glued and they are really soft, even when they are synthetic ones, which is good because it is cruelty free. The sponge is just perfect!! Excellent quality and covers up perfectly. The case is absolutely nice, pretty, and handy, so you can have it just to hold your brushes or to hang them around. I definitely love this case, brushes, and sponge in an awesome price.

I received this product at a discount in exchange for my honest review. [5.0/5] Fantastic, high quality set of bushes... These are at the top of my list of favorite set of makeup brushes! This set includes 6 brushes, a black beauty blender sponge, and a black holder/travel case. The brush are synthetic, meaning they are great for either liquid, creams, or powders.
Brushes:
Powder/Blush brush - rounded
Foundation brush - best for concealers and under eyes
Eye Shadow brush - for eyelids
Blending brush - blending darker colors in crease/outer
Angled Liner brush - great for eyebrows and lining eyes
Lip brush - also great for inner eye highlighting
* I love that they are labeled as well on the brush handles. The metal ferrules are securely and firmly attached to the handles. During washing each one prior to using (***highly recommended for any brushes before using - wash first***), but not one brisel has shed yet. Since they are synthetic brushes, they are in fact 100% vegan and 100% cruelty-free. Any animal hair type brushes made are primarily used for powders only. Majority of brushes being made now are mostly made with synthetic brisels. If you ask me, they really look a lot like the Morphe brushes that are actually made by the Crown company! ;)
Beauty sponge:
Latex free, but has a more dense, smooth (like suede) texture and feel.
Little tip:
I have found that it works really great for setting the powder under my eyes. Dampen it and squeeze out with a paper towel, and dap into an illuminating powder and dab/press under eyes to set. It will reduce crinkles and cakiness under eyes.
The holder is PU leather, very sturdy and great for holding brushes and/or traveling.
I have to mention that I did receive this set at a discounted price from the seller for me to try out and leave my own honest review. With that said, I would definitely recommend this brush set to anyone, especially at the sell price it is at while writing this review. As soon as I can I will update with a video review for you. I hope my review helps you, please feel free to contact me if you have any questions and if my review did help you, would you let me know by clicking YES below for me, I would greatly appreciate it! [5.0/5] Five Stars Just what I wanted [5.0/5] ... my teenage granddaughter and I'm quite sure she will love them. Bought these as a Christmas gift for my teenage granddaughter and I'm quite sure she will love them. [5.0/5] High Quality Brushes Really nice brushes. High quality. The first thing I did was check the bristles to see how soft they were and pulled on the lightly to see if there were any loose bristles. Also inspected the collar to see how well it was mounted and if it would hold up to wear and tear. Only time will tell but they seem to be really well made. [4.0/5] Four Stars I like these. Sturdy, functional. I use them daily. Nicer than others in the price range. [5.0/5] Beautiful!!! I am pretty new to wearing make- up so when I decided to look for a brush set I figured his would be a good one, and I was right. I got the make-up brush set in two or three days; that’s always a plus. It came in a very cute black tube (this is a keepsake tube). Inside of the tube were the brushes and a blending sponge (another plus).
When I took the brushes out I instantly fell in love these brushes are super soft and elegant looking. I can tell they are made out of quality materials, and if taken care of properly you will have these for a very long time. When I used the brushes for the first time, I could tell that the bristles were not going to come and stick all over my face like other brushes I have bought in the pass.
In this set you get, a blush brush, foundation brush, eye shadow brush, blending brush, lip brush, and an angled liner brush. You also get the blending sponge. I am very happy with my purchase and I am going to purchase another set of these for my mother, she will love these. These brushes also make a great gift especially because of the cast they come in.
I received this product at a discounted rate for my honest, unbiased, opinion. I take all of my reviews seriously and I am always honest about them. [5.0/5] ... this set for my daughter for Xmas and she loved it. Brushes are so soft Bought this set for my daughter for Xmas and she loved it. Brushes are so soft. [5.0/5] Five Stars Great set of brushes ..This is a Christmas gift [5.0/5] She loved them and especially the caddy Bought the brushes for a friend. She loved them and especially the caddy. [5.0/5] The best There so soft and cute. I just dont know how to clean the foundation brush. Anyone that could help? [4.0/5] I like the foundation brush I like the foundation brush. Before I am just using my finger when applying foundation, and now since I like this product this is my everyday partner for my foundation. [5.0/5] I'm so happy to have it in my collection High quality, and so soft!!
I'm so happy to have it in my collection!

response:
This makeup brush set receives overwhelmingly positive reviews, with most customers giving it 5 out of 5 stars. Customers consistently praise the softness of the brushes, noting they feel high quality and do not shed like cheaper brushes. The set includes brushes for powder, blush, foundation, eyeshadow, blending, liner, and lips, along with a beauty blender sponge. Reviewers appreciate that the brushes are labeled, synthetic, vegan, and cruelty free.

The carrying case is frequently highlighted as a standout feature, described as sturdy, attractive, and practical for storage and travel. The blending sponge is noted as soft and effective, though a couple of reviewers felt it did not compare to higher end sponges like the Beauty Blender.

A few minor complaints were mentioned, including a slight chemical smell from the PU leather case that fades over time, and some felt the powder brush was a bit small. One reviewer suggested using the blush brush as a powder brush instead.

Many customers purchased the set as a gift for daughters, granddaughters, or friends, and recipients were very happy with it. Several reviewers noted they received the product at a discount in exchange for an honest review. Overall, customers feel the set offers excellent value for the price and would recommend it.
